title: Warning notice: “PKB Bank Finanzierung”

Warning notice: “PKB Bank Finanzierung”
Warning notice: “PKB Bank Finanzierung”
19.01.24
•
Supervision and Regulation
The Liechtenstein Financial Market Authority (FMA) informs that “PKB Bank Finanzierung” offers financial services in social media (Facebook) without a license or registration by the FMA und therefore is not listed in the official register of the FMA.
“PKB Bank Finanzierung" unlawfully uses the name and logo of PKB Private Bank SA, a bank licensed in Switzerland.
It is highly recommended not to use social media for financial services, in particular not to respond to offers or to transfer funds and cryptocurrencies.
